modules.sql: SELECT as_of AS wire_date, COUNT(*) AS wire_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(SUM(amount) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_amount, as_of FROM wire_transfers WHERE as_of IS NOT NULL GROUP BY as_of UNION ALL SELECT 'MONTHLY_TOTAL' AS wire_date, COUNT(*) AS wire_count, ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(SUM(amount) / COUNT(*), 2) AS avg_amount, MAX(as_of) AS as_of FROM wire_transfers WHERE as_of IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 AND strftime('%d', MAX(as_of), '+1 day') = '01'
